capabilities.description: Generate a company-wide status report: task board, agent health, pipeline status, costs
Provide real-time monitoring data from /ops dashboard (task board, cost summary, agent health)
Send Telegram alerts when critical thresholds are breached (test failures, cost spikes, sync failures)
Run infrastructure health checks: dependency audit, build verification, cron job status

skills.description: Run npx tsx scripts/company-tasks.ts board to get current task board state
skills.returns: { total: number, byStatus: Record<string, number>, byDepartment: Record<string, object>, recent: Task[] }

skills.description: Check data connector sync status and cron job health
skills.returns: { sources: Array<{ name: string, status: string, lastSync: string }>, cronHealth: string }
